name: Hermits2
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Elizabeth Powell
Preparation Time: 2:00
1. Chop raisins finely in a food processor with 1/4 cup flour.
2. Sift 2 cups flour with soda, cream of tartar, and spices.
3. Cream butter with sugar until smooth.
4. Add dry ingredients alternately with milk until well blended.
5. Stir in raisins and enough additional flour up to 3/4 cup to make a stiff dough.
6. Shape into two logs about 1-1-1/2 inches diameter.
7. Chill overnight or freeze.
8. When ready to make, slice to desired thickness and bake at 375-400 degrees until done (15-20 minutes).
